run.name: Publish API Docs

head_commit.message:
Implement `FaultSignal` conversion for LoongArch

The `FaultSignal::from(&CpuExceptionInfo)` was left as
`unimplemented!()`. Map all exception types to their corresponding
POSIX signals, matching the Linux behavior where applicable.

Signed-off-by: Chao Liu <chao.liu.zevorn@gmail.com>
